     4. ABOUT ME

## 🚀 About Me

<img align="right" alt="Coding GIF" width="380" src="https://media.giphy.com/media/qgQUggAC3Pft6/giphy.gif">

- 🔭 Passionate about **Software Development** and **Artificial Intelligence**
- 💪 Strong in **Java**, **Data Structures & Algorithms**, and **Problem Solving**
- 🧩 Solved **300+ DSA problems** across coding platforms
- 🌐 Interested in **Backend Development**, **Full Stack Development**, **AI**, and **Machine Learning**
- 📚 Currently learning **Spring Boot**, **System Design**, and **Advanced DSA**
- 💼 Looking for **Software Engineering Internship** opportunities
- 🌱 Always eager to learn new technologies and contribute to **Open Source**
- ⚡ Fun fact: I enjoy turning tricky DSA problems into clean, optimized solutions
- 🎯 Objective: To build scalable, real-world software while growing as an engineer who writes maintainable, efficient code

<!-- ================================================================
     8. FEATURED PROJECTS
     ================================================================ -->
## 💻 Featured Projects

<details open>
<summary><b>📌 PrepIQ – AI-Based Placement Intelligence System</b></summary>
<br/>

> A placement preparation and analytics platform that helps students prepare smarter.

- 🎯 Implemented **weak-topic detection** and **personalized roadmap generation**
- 🗄️ Used **PostgreSQL**, **Git**, and **GitHub** for data management and version control

`PostgreSQL` `Git` `GitHub` `AI/ML`

</details>

<br/>

<details open>
<summary><b>🏋️ Fitness GoalTracker – Full Stack Web Application</b></summary>
<br/>

> A full stack fitness tracking app with secure authentication and goal management.

- ⚛️ Built using **React**, **Node.js**, and **Express**
- 🔐 Implemented **secure user authentication** and **goal tracking** features
- 🎨 Designed a **responsive frontend** integrated with backend APIs

`React` `Node.js` `Express`

</details>

<br/>

<details open>
<summary><b>💼 Job Searching Portal – Backend System</b></summary>
<br/>

> A robust backend system for a job search platform, built with clean MVC architecture.

- 🏗️ Developed backend modules using **Spring Boot** following **MVC architecture**
- 🔑 Implemented **JWT authentication**, **pagination**, **sorting**, and **Swagger API documentation**
- 🌐 Designed **RESTful APIs** integrated with **MySQL** using **JPA/Hibernate**
- ⚡ Optimized database queries to improve application performance

`Spring Boot` `MySQL` `JPA/Hibernate` `JWT` `Swagger`

</details>

<br/>
